title: Review serialize_within_feature_tree implementation
description: Review all changes for the serialize_within_feature_tree feature: config field and YAML loader semantics, short-circuit logic in `_beads_conflict()` and `_find_conflict_reason()`, onboarding template update, test coverage, and documentation accuracy. Verify the flag default is `False`, cross-tree parallelism is unaffected, non-mutating agents are excluded from the rule, and the conflict reason string matches the spec exactly.
acceptance_criteria: Config field and YAML loader semantics are correct and match the spec
Short-circuit logic covers all three guard conditions (same tree, flag on, both mutating)
Conflict reason string matches `"worktree serialization enabled — waiting on in-progress <bead_id>"` exactly
Cross-tree and non-mutating-agent edge cases are handled correctly
All five test scenarios from the spec are present and meaningful
CLAUDE.md and docs/multi-backend-agents.md documentation is accurate
